revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-315

A resonant reed operated as a switch which will be actuated only at the mechanical resonance frequency of the reed, usually in the audio frequency range.

{{IALAFooter}}
